actionable_feedback: Execute solubility_calibration.ipynb end-to-end in a clean, isolated environment and capture the run outputs (printed outputs and any generated CSVs). Attach those run outputs to the attempt.

Add an intermediate_calculations.csv (or similar machine-readable artifact) that contains per-record fields and computed intermediates used for metrics: residual, abs_residual, residual_pct, leverage, needs_review, etc., so verifiers can validate numbers without re-running the notebook.
Untruncate and expand [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] so the full decision table and sensitivity_plus_5pct lines are visible in the preview; ensure file size remains reasonable.

Include a brief expert_review_memo.md artifact (or augment model_card.md) that summarizes any environment fallbacks (e.g., numpy unavailable and stdlib used), states deterministic seeds/assumptions, and cites where intermediate CSVs are produced.

Add a deterministic run cell in the notebook that writes intermediate_calculations.csv and actual_outputs.json from the canonical packet values; include a requirements/comment cell describing optional dependencies and the pure-stdlib fallback implemented in the trace.
Fix any minor formatting/truncation issues so the verifier can confirm metric parity between model_card.md, actual_outputs.json, and notebook outputs.
